name: Llaüt cruise along the north coast (Mar en Calma, Fornells)
description: Sail the north coast aboard a wooden llaüt, the island's traditional Menorcan boat, with two swimming stops in crystal-clear water and a Menorcan aperitif. The wild north, unhurried and without the crowds.

highlights: set out from Fornells aboard a traditional Menorcan llaüt (Portobello / Don Pancho)
two stops to swim, snorkel and paddleboard in coves along the north coast
a Menorcan aperitif on board; around 3 h 30 min of calm sailing
